title: Issue-creation threshold rules + expanded lifecycle states
description: Two linked decisions to cut tracker bloat: (1) rules for when a thought deserves a full issue vs a subtask vs a brainstorm entry; (2) expand the 4-state lifecycle into three categories — Not Started (open, blocked/deferred), In Progress (in-progress, review), Completed (closed, cancelled) — retiring the assignees-derived in-progress signal. Spans code (frontend + backend), user-guide docs, guide.ts, and the skill plugin.
author: sidhantha
